subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Abhá Kingdom! Sanctify thyself from every remembrance save the remembrance of the All-Glorious, and close thine eye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی ملکوت الابهی قدس نفسک عن کل ذکر الا ذکر البهاء و اغمض عینک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
